rules.name: BP_AutoFill_Address
rules.description: When changing business partner, auto-fill partner address from customer's default shipping address

rules.name: RMA_AutoFill_Header
rules.description: When selecting an RMA, auto-fill business partner, warehouse, and order reference from the RMA header

rules.name: Product_AutoFill_UOM
rules.description: When selecting a product, auto-fill UOM from product definition

rules.name: ReadOnly_When_Processed
rules.description: Lock all editable fields when receipt status is Completed or Voided

rules.name: Validate_Qty_Positive
rules.description: Before save, validate that movementQty is greater than zero

rules.name: Validate_Locator_Available
rules.description: Before completing, validate that the destination locator exists and is active in the specified warehouse
